{{Item
| name = 
| image = Dog bath.png
| id = dog_bath
| type = Blocks
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Dog Bath''' is a decoration block that used to have a function.

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Iron Ingots <br>+ Water Bucket
|[[File:Dog bath crafting.png]]
|}

== Trivia ==
* Dog Bath used to have a function:
<blockquote>When standing in the dog bath, the dog seems to continuously shake, flinging water particles and occasionally dropping fish if you have spent skill points on the Fisher Dog skill, all you have to do is get your dog sitting in the bath. <ref>https://doggytalents.fandom.com/wiki/List_of_Items_and_Equipment</ref>
</blockquote>
* Although it currently serves as a decoration block, DashieDev suggested that it might return and have more applications in the near future.

<references />
